sourceTitle: Haggadah for Pesaḥ — Nusaḥ Ashkenaz with Additions

modules.exactText: For the next portion, we will go around the table, each person reading a paragraph in whichever language they prefer, up until the end of the normative four children text.

locator.edition: Haggadah for Pesaḥ — Nusaḥ Ashkenaz with Additions
locator.sourceLocation: PDF p. 8 (printed Hebrew p. ח), Maggid

modules.exactText: Now the alternate challenge — We’re going to make our own! Going round the table, we will count up from one to thirteen, thinking of something else (preferably but not necessarily Jewish content) that fits that number. After each number, we will respond, together, singing everything we’ve come up with. By the end we’ll have to remember them all!
